meta.title: StableFit — for coaches | Client, workout & nutrition platform
meta.description: StableFit for coaches: manage clients, training plans, nutrition and progress in one app. Automate admin, exercise library, chat and analytics.
meta.keywords: StableFit, fitness coach, personal trainer, client management, workout plans, progress tracking, nutrition, fitness app
meta.ogDescription: One platform for fitness coaches: clients, workouts, nutrition and progress.
meta.twitterDescription: One platform for fitness coaches: clients, workouts, nutrition and progress.

hero.description: StableFit gives fitness coaches one platform to manage clients, build training programs, track nutrition, and monitor progress.

features.description: Most coaches spend hours on administration. Spreadsheets, messengers, and manual tracking instead of working with clients. StableFit fixes this.

withoutItems.item2: Client data scattered across different apps
withoutItems.item3: Inconvenient training plans in Excel / Doc
withoutItems.item4: Progress tracking on paper or in notes

withItems.item2: All necessary client info in one place

functionality.description: StableFit combines the functionality of several apps and significantly speeds up and simplifies coaches' work.

clients.title: Client management
clients.description: Keep all client information in one place and manage it easily. Add new clients, record key data, and keep personal notes.

workouts.title: Workout library
workouts.description: Use ready-made workouts from the app, adapt them to your goals, or create your own from scratch. Build individual plans for clients and track completion.

points.item2: Edit and create your own programs

nutrition.title: Progress tracking
nutrition.description: Track clients’ results over time. Review changes in weight and measurements they enter in the app, and the reminder system will help clients update data regularly.

points.item2: Before/after photos for visual progress tracking

analytics.title: Nutrition monitoring
analytics.description: Monitor clients’ diet without extra check-ins. Review meals, analyze calories, and nutrient balance.

points.item1: Automatic calorie & macros targets based on client data and goals
points.item2: Clients can easily track meals (manual, photo, or barcode)
points.item3: AI-powered calorie and macro calculation for foods

communication.title: Easy communication
communication.description: Chat with clients directly in the app. All communication is in one place — without switching between different messengers.

points.item1: Chat with clients in one app

description.line1: Visual measurement charts, before/after comparisons, and complete change history.
description.line2: Show clients how far they've come and motivate them to continue.

measurements.title: Body measurements
measurements.description: Track changes in volume across all zones

automatisation.description: StableFit takes over administrative work so you can focus on coaching, not spreadsheets.

first.title: Efficient training workflow
first.description: Create individual programs in minutes, while the app collects feedback after workouts and helps adjust load without extra messaging.

second.title: Client motivation support
second.description:
The system helps track measurements and workout results, building clear progress visibility.
Clients see changes and stay engaged without additional reminders.

third.title: Automatic reminders for measurements and metrics

description.line1: The app reminds clients about measurements at the right time.
description.line2: Automation reduces your manual control and helps clients track progress consistently.

third.noteDescription: Update your metrics to see progress.

fourth.title: Tools that make you a pro
fourth.description: All processes run systematically. This strengthens your expert image, increases client trust, and improves work results.

testimonials.description: Built for the modern fitness professional who wants to scale their business without juggling extra tools.
testimonials.marqueeAria: Scrolling row of coach testimonial cards

first.text: Finally one app instead of Telegram, Excel, and a paper notebook. I recommend it to all my colleagues.
first.name: Vadym Prytula

second.text: Clients track progress themselves and message with questions. Their motivation went up and churn dropped by half.
second.name: Kateryna Sydorenko

third.text: I used to spend 3 hours a day on spreadsheets. Now it’s 20 minutes. I took 4 more clients and earn more.
third.name: Oleksii Melnyk

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.text: StableFit respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share information about you when you use our mobile application and website. Data Controller: Ihor Savva, operating in Poland. Contact: support@stable-fit.com

items.item1: Account Data: Name, email address, role (Coach or Client).
items.item2: Health & Biometric Data (Sensitive): If you choose to provide it, we collect body measurements (weight, volumes) and progress photos. Processing this data is necessary for the core functionality of the Service.
items.item3: Usage Data: Logs, device information, and performance data.

items.item1: To provide and maintain the Service.
items.item2: To allow Coaches to view Client progress (only upon Client's assignment).
items.item3: To monitor usage and fix technical issues.
items.item4: We do NOT sell your personal data or photos to third parties.

items.item1: Storage Provider: Your data (including photos) is stored securely using Supabase (a backend-as-a-service provider).
items.item2: Access Control: Photos are technically accessible only to the authorized Client and their assigned Coach.
items.item4: Security: While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your data, remember that no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

items.item1: With Your Coach: Your assigned Coach has access to your progress data and photos. Note: While our app does not have a "Download" button, Coaches accessing the service via a web browser may be able to save images using standard browser functions.
items.item2: Legal Requirements: We may disclose your data if required to do so by Polish law or in response to valid requests by public authorities.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights (GDPR/RODO)
rights.text: Users in the European Union have the following rights:

items.item1: Access: Request a copy of the data we hold about you.
items.item3: Deletion: Request deletion of your account and all associated data (photos/measurements).
items.item4: Withdraw Consent: You can stop sharing photos at any time by deleting them or not uploading new ones.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention
retention.text: We retain your personal data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. If you delete your account, your data (including photos) will be removed from our active databases.

meta.title: Terms of Service — StableFit
meta.description: Terms of Service for StableFit users.
meta.ogDescription: Terms of Service for StableFit users.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.text1: Welcome to StableFit ("we," "our," or "us"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the StableFit mobile application and website (collectively, the "Service"). The Service is operated by Great Solution - Ihor Savva, a Sole Proprietorship registered in Poland.
introduction.text2: By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the Service.

age.title: 2. Age Restriction (Important)
age.text: The Service is intended solely for users who are 18 years of age or older. By accessing or using the Service, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old. We do not knowingly collect information from anyone under the age of 18.

description.title: 3. Description of Service
description.text: StableFit is a platform that facilitates communication and progress tracking between fitness coaches ("Coaches") and their clients ("Clients").

items.item1: We are a Tool Provider: StableFit provides the software infrastructure. We do not provide fitness advice, medical diagnosis, or employ the Coaches using our platform.
items.item2: No Coach Verification: We do not verify the credentials, diplomas, or certifications of Coaches. Clients are solely responsible for vetting their Coaches before engaging in any training program.

medical.title: 4. Medical Disclaimer
medical.text: StableFit is not a medical application. The content, charts, and data within the Service are for informational purposes only.

items.item1: You should consult your physician or other health care practitioner before starting any exercise program.
items.item2: StableFit is not responsible for any health problems, injuries, or damages that may result from training programs provided by Coaches or your use of the Service.

items.item1: Voluntary Upload: Clients may choose to upload photos (front, side, back) and body measurements to track progress. Uploading photos is entirely optional.
items.item2: Ownership: You retain all rights to the photos and data you upload.
items.item3: License to Us: By uploading content, you grant StableFit a limited license to store and display this content solely to you and your assigned Coach for the purpose of providing the Service.
items.item4: Prohibited Content: You agree not to upload content that is illegal, pornographic (sexual acts), harassing, or violates any third-party rights. We reserve the right (but have no obligation) to remove such content.

items.item1: Service Fees: Currently, StableFit is free to use. We reserve the right to introduce subscription fees for Coaches in the future with prior notice.
items.item2: Coach-Client Payments: Any financial transaction for coaching services is strictly between the Coach and the Client. StableFit is not a party to these transactions and is not responsible for refunds or disputes regarding coaching services.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.text1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law (including Polish Consumer Law), StableFit shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including but not limited to damages for loss of profits, data, or goodwill.
liability.text2: We explicitly disclaim liability for any actions or advice provided by Coaches to Clients.

law.title: 8. Governing Law
law.text: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Poland, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at: support@stable-fit.com

meta.title: Support — StableFit
meta.ogDescription: Need help with StableFit? Contact us.

support.title: Support
support.lead: Welcome! We are here to help you get the most out of StableFit — the app for tracking progress, transformation photos, and working with your coach.

how.title: How does StableFit work?
how.lead: StableFit is a mobile app that allows you to:

items.item1: Record body measurements and track changes
items.item2: Store progress photos and compare results
items.item3: Receive forms and instructions from your coach
items.item4: Receive push notifications about important updates

how.note: Registration is available only via a personal invite link from your coach. If you have not received a link yet, contact your coach or write to us.

contact.title: Need help
contact.lead: You can contact us with any question:

footer.description: A platform that unites fitness coaches and their clients to achieve outstanding results.
